name: Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and crush all the garlic cloves from the large head(s) of garlic.
2. Remove the crusts from the white bread slices.
3. Place the crustless bread in a mixing bowl.
4. Add the crushed garlic, olive oil, and white vinegar to the bowl with the bread.
5. Let the mixture soften for 1 hour at room temperature.
6. Beat the softened mixture with an electric mixer until it is smooth.
7. Do not process the mixture in a food processor as it will become too smooth.
8. Gradually add lemon juice to the mixture while continuing to beat.
9. Slowly incorporate water into the mixture while the mixer is running to achieve a thick and fluffy sauce.
